common.name: Name
common.session_expired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
common.permission_denied: This action is not allowed for your role.
common.server_error: Connection to our servers is temporarily interrupted. Your data is safe — the action simply could not be saved. Wait a few seconds and try again, or reload the page if the problem persists.
common.access_denied_body: This section is not available with your current role ({{role}}). Contact the administrator if you think you need this access.
common.read_only_mode: Read-only mode — your role ({{role}}) cannot modify data in this section.

ui.balance_will_go_negative: The account will go overdraft: balance after operation {{after}} {{currency}}.

login.subtitle_login: Access your dashboard and accounting data.
login.hero_subtitle: FNE invoicing, CNPS payroll, SYSCOHADA accounting, Mobile Money collections. Everything your spreadsheet can't do, in one tool.
login.demo_description: The demo account is pre-loaded with realistic data — you try everything, you key in nothing.
login.demo_features: Invoices · Inventory · CNPS payroll · Mobile Money · FNE
login.register_advantages_1: A company and its SYSCOHADA chart of accounts are created for you
login.register_advantages_2: You stay the owner of your data, exportable at any time
login.register_advantages_3: No credit card asked during the demo
login.name: Full name

billing.title: Quotes & invoicing
billing.desc: The whole sales cycle, from draft to DGI-certified invoice.
items: Quotes with tracked lifecycle (draft, sent, accepted, converted)
One-click conversion quote → invoice, no re-keying
Credit notes compliant with SYSCOHADA
DGI FNE certification stamped at every issuance
Sequential numbering by fiscal year
Customisable PDF export (logo, header, terms, legal mentions)

purchases.title: Purchases & suppliers
purchases.desc: Run your payables without chasing anyone.
items: Purchase orders with validation and receipt
Supplier payables schedule with alerts
Multi-method payments (transfer, Mobile Money, cash, cheque)
Automatic supplier-account lettering
OCR import of supplier invoices from photos
Tracking of partial payments and balances per supplier

stock.title: Products & inventory
stock.desc: One catalog, one SYSCOHADA valuation, zero parallel spreadsheet.
items: Multi-category catalog with variants and barcodes
Weighted Average Cost (CMP) valuation per SYSCOHADA
Inventory movements: in, out, transfers, adjustments
Periodic physical counts with auto-detected discrepancies
Low-stock and out-of-stock alerts
Multi-warehouse (main store, secondary depots)

treasury.title: Treasury
treasury.desc: See every dollar, on every bank, in real time.
items: Multiple bank accounts managed in parallel
Import bank statements in OFX and CSV
Guided bank reconciliation, line by line
Dedicated journals for cash and Mobile Money
Automated collections via Wave, Orange Money, MTN MoMo
Consolidated view of balances and cash position

payroll.title: Payroll & HR
payroll.desc: Ivorian payslips compliant every month, no manual math.
items: Payslips compliant with Ivorian law (CNPS, ITS, CMU)
Automatic computation of employee and employer shares
Monthly bulk generation for the whole headcount
Dedicated HR role with scoped permissions
Tracking of paid leave, absences and balances
Export payslips as PDF, ready to hand out

assets.title: Fixed assets
assets.desc: Depreciation runs itself, fiscal year after fiscal year.
items: Straight-line and declining-balance depreciation per asset
Annual entries posted automatically at year-end close
Disposals, write-offs and exceptional exits tracked
Individual depreciation plan exportable as PDF
Unique inventory number per asset
SYSCOHADA asset categorisation

accounting.title: SYSCOHADA accounting
accounting.desc: An OHADA-compliant accounting engine, wired into every module.
items: Pre-installed SYSCOHADA chart of accounts (804 accounts)
Accounting entries generated automatically by every module
General journal, ledger and trial balance available in real time
Manual journal entries (OD) with debit = credit enforcement
Guided year-end close, automatic opening balances
TXT and Excel exports for DGI audits (OHADA art. 17)

reports.title: Taxes & reports
reports.desc: Every statement and filing expected by the DGI and CNPS.
items: Monthly VAT computed and ready to file
Corporate income tax with detailed base
CNPS statements and monthly social filings
SYSCOHADA balance sheet and P&L at any date
Alerts seven days before each DGI or CNPS deadline
PDF export of every statement, signed by ApeX

mobile_money.title: WhatsApp checkout
mobile_money.desc: Customers receive the payment link right inside their conversation. The invoice flips to paid the moment the operator confirms the transaction — no more Friday-night chase calls.
mobile_money.quote: “Friday nights, I no longer chase cheques.”

ocr.title: Mistral OCR built in
ocr.desc: The AI reads your supplier documents, picks up amounts, detects VAT and suggests the right account. You approve in one click, without reopening the receipts drawer.
ocr.metric_label: Fields read correctly on first pass
ocr.quote: “My drivers send receipts as photos. That's it.”

fne.title: FNE-certified by the DGI
fne.desc: Every invoice is transmitted to the tax authority at issuance. Fiscal number and verification QR are stamped automatically — you stay compliant without thinking about it.
fne.quote: “DGI audit in March: zero reserve, zero penalty.”

login.hero_bullet_1: Wave, Orange Money, MTN MoMo built in: your customers pay in 10 seconds, from their phone
login.hero_bullet_2: Snap a photo of a receipt: vendor, date, VAT and accounting code are filled in automatically
login.hero_bullet_3: Every invoice ships FNE-certified by the DGI — you're compliant the moment you click « issue »
login.mockup_qr_help: Customers verify authenticity directly on the FNE portal.
login.mockup_emetteur_legal: RCCM CI-ABJ-2024-B-1234 · Tax ID 1234567A · Standard regime
login.mockup_amount_in_words_value: one million four hundred fifty-one thousand four hundred FCFA
login.doc_caption_help: Invoice, quote, CNPS payslip, annual balance sheet, depreciation plan and an OHADA general ledger exportable for the DGI — one tool, six deliverables ready to ship.
login.team_title: Every teammate, exactly where they belong
login.team_subtitle: Ten business roles ship pre-configured by ApeX with their default permissions — your accountant, your sales rep, your auditor land with the right scope from the very first invite. And you stay in charge: as Owner, you can open or restrict any member's access at any time, action by action, module by module.
login.team_bullet_1: Ten roles ready to use — Owner, Admin, Chartered Accountant, In-house Accountant, HR Lead, Sales, Stock Keeper, Auditor, User, Read-only
login.team_bullet_2: Smart defaults or fine-grained customisation — tick or untick every action (read, create, update, delete, counter-entry) per module, per member
login.team_bullet_3: Email invites: pick the role, ApeX loads the default permissions, you adjust before sending or later from Settings → Members
login.team_bullet_4: Full audit log — who did what, when, from which IP, on which module — ready for DGI inspection and external auditors
login.team_matrix_caption: Default permissions — editable by the Owner
login.team_stat_roles_label: Business roles ready to use, editable in one click
login.team_stat_actions_label: Permissions toggled module by module, for each member
login.team_stat_audit_label: Of actions tracked in the audit log
login.dashboard_title: The right number, at the right moment
login.dashboard_subtitle: Not another dashboard to check. ApeX surfaces what needs a decision today: an overdue customer, a tax deadline three days out, a margin starting to slip.
login.dashboard_bullet_1: Cash position in real time, per account and across all banks
login.dashboard_bullet_2: Alerts seven days before each DGI or CNPS deadline
login.dashboard_bullet_3: Create an invoice, expense or payslip straight from the home screen
login.dashboard_bullet_4: Twelve rolling months of revenue, exportable to CSV
login.diff_section_title: What a spreadsheet will never give you
login.diff_section_subtitle: Three automations built for the Ivorian field — not three checkboxes on a product sheet.
login.features_section_subtitle: From the first quote to the SYSCOHADA balance sheet, including CNPS payroll and fixed assets — everything is here, everything is linked, and every entry made in one module flows into the others automatically.
login.how_subtitle: The demo account is already loaded: one customer, two invoices, three expenses and one payslip. Watch the flow before you ever type your own data.
login.how_step1_desc: Email, password, legal name. You land on the dashboard with a SYSCOHADA chart of accounts already installed and your 10 categories ready to use.
login.how_step2_desc: Standard form for a brand-new invoice, or a photo of the receipt for supplier documents. VAT and the accounting entry write themselves without you having to think about them.
login.how_step3_desc: The payment link is sent over WhatsApp the second the invoice ships. When the customer pays, the bank reconciliation is done before you close the tab.
login.pricing_subtitle: From 9,000 FCFA per month for a 3-employee SME. Try it free, cancel in two clicks from your account.
login.plan_demo_tagline: To try the app with fake data, risk-free.
login.plan_demo_feat3: Mobile Money and OCR in demo mode
login.plan_pme_tagline: For the Ivorian SME that wants to centralise everything without breaking the bank.
login.plan_pme_feat2: Mobile Money in production (Wave, Orange, MTN)
login.plan_pro_tagline: For holdings, accounting firms and multi-company structures.
login.plan_pro_feat4: Automated OHADA general ledger export for the DGI
login.pricing_note: Payment by bank transfer, Wave or Orange Money. Monthly billing, cancel anytime from your account.

imports.title_plan_comptable: Import a custom chart of accounts
imports.subtitle_clients: Bring in your address book from an Excel or CSV file (Sage, Ciel, home-made Excel…). Download the template if you're starting from scratch.
imports.subtitle_fournisseurs: Bring in your supplier list from an Excel or CSV file. Standard columns are detected automatically, regardless of order.
imports.subtitle_produits: Bring in your product catalog with sale price, cost, unit, category and VAT rate.
imports.subtitle_plan_comptable: Add your custom accounts on top of the SYSCOHADA chart already installed. Class and nature are inferred from the number if not provided.
imports.subtitle_balance_ouverture: Bring in the opening balances of the fiscal year. ApeX creates an OHADA-compliant « opening » entry. Total debit must equal total credit.
imports.subtitle_ecritures_historiques: Migrate entries from a previous fiscal year (Sage export, FEC, etc.). Every voucher must be balanced. Missing accounts are auto-created.
imports.drop_zone_title: Click or drop your file here
imports.drop_zone_help: Excel (.xlsx, .xls) or CSV — up to 5 MB, 5,000 rows
imports.success_subtitle: {{count}} row(s) added successfully. You'll find them in the list.
imports.error_generic: Import error. Check the file format.

factures.title: Invoices
factures.subtitle: Final documents · Credit notes · Payments
factures.draft_info: Draft: editable and deletable, no accounting entry.
factures.validate_info: Validate: generates the automatic accounting entry (irreversible).
factures.banner_avoir_body: Cancels a previous invoice in part or in full. Reference it in the notes.
factures.banner_devis_html: Need a quote or proforma? Head to the Quotes & Proformas page — an accepted quote becomes an invoice in one click.
factures.hint_facture_origine: Required for SYSCOHADA compliance. The list narrows to the selected client if any.
factures.error_lien_wave: Could not generate the payment link
factures.lien_wave_mock_notice: Demo mode: this link does not trigger a real payment. Configure your Wave merchant account under Settings → Integrations to go live.
factures.lien_wave_intro: Share this link with your customer. They can pay in seconds from their Wave app, and ApeX will automatically settle the invoice.
factures.lien_wave_whatsapp_text: Hello, here is the link to pay invoice {{numero}}: {{url}}
factures.lien_wave_qr_hint: Have your customer scan the QR code from their phone, or copy the link and send it through WhatsApp or SMS.
factures.lien_mtn_intro: An MTN MoMo notification is sent to the entered number. The customer enters their secret PIN to confirm and ApeX will then settle the invoice automatically.
factures.picker_fournisseur_intro: Multiple providers are configured for your company. Pick the one to use for this invoice.
factures.mtn_number_intro: Enter the customer's MTN phone number. A payment request (USSD push) will be sent right away.
factures.mtn_number_required: Phone number is required for MTN MoMo
factures.fne_intro: This invoice has been declared to the Ivorian tax authority (DGI). The FNE number and QR code below let your customer verify the authenticity of the invoice.
factures.fne_qr_hint: The customer scans this QR code from their phone to verify the invoice on the DGI portal.
factures.fne_mock_notice: Demo mode: this FNE number is simulated and has no fiscal value. Configure your DGI credentials in Settings to go live.

devis.title: Quotes & Proformas
devis.subtitle: Pre-invoices · One-click conversion
devis.confirm_convert: Convert this quote into a final invoice?
devis.lifecycle_html: Lifecycle: a new quote is « pending ». Once accepted by the client, convert it to an invoice in one click — lines and amounts carry over automatically.
devis.convert_intro_html: A new invoice will be created for {{client}}, carrying over the {{amount}} FCFA incl. tax from the quote. The quote will move to « Converted ».
devis.convert_validate_now_hint: Generates the accounting entry and stock movements. Otherwise the invoice stays a draft.

ocr.title: Scan an invoice or receipt
ocr.intro: Take a picture of a supplier invoice or receipt: ApeX automatically extracts the supplier, date, amount and VAT so you don't have to type them in.
ocr.btn_capture: Take a photo or choose a file
ocr.notice_mock: OCR service is not yet active on your subscription — the values shown are samples. Contact your ApeX administrator to enable automatic invoice reading.
ocr.toast_mock_mode: Demo preview — OCR will soon be enabled on your subscription.
ocr.error_type: Unsupported format — please use a JPG, PNG or WEBP image.
ocr.error_generic: Could not analyse the document. Try again with a sharper image.

depenses.subtitle: Paid charges · Pending charges
depenses.no_data_text: No expenses yet. Start recording them!
depenses.placeholder_fournisseur: Orange CI, Landlord, or type a name...
depenses.tip_create_supplier: Tip: create a supplier record with « + » to track per-vendor liabilities (account 4011).
depenses.convert_info: The expense stays in place but is flagged as converted. The fixed asset inherits the amount excl. tax, supplier and reference. Yearly depreciation entries must be generated from the Fixed Assets page.

comptabilite.title: SYSCOHADA Accounting
comptabilite.subtitle: Chart of accounts, entries, general ledger, trial balance and DGI export
comptabilite.gl_select_account: Select an account from the ledger
comptabilite.cloture_help: Closing locks the entries of the fiscal year and automatically transfers the balance of classes 6/7 to the profit account (13), then opens the next year with the opening balance entry.
comptabilite.cloture_effects_desc: Two transfer entries (class 6 charges and class 7 revenues) towards account 13 are posted to the OD journal. The next fiscal year is automatically created with an opening balance entry (AN journal) carrying the balance sheet balances. No further accounting entries can be added to {{libelle}}.
comptabilite.cloture_confirm: Permanently close {{libelle}}? This action is IRREVERSIBLE: no further accounting entries can be added to this fiscal year.
comptabilite.gl_prompt: Enter an account number (or prefix) to display the general ledger.
comptabilite.gl_empty: No entries for this account in the period
comptabilite.fy_intro: Closing locks the entries of the fiscal year and automatically transfers the balance of classes 6/7 to the profit account (13), then opens the next year with the opening balance entry.
comptabilite.cloture_effects_body: Two transfer entries (class 6 charges and class 7 revenues) towards account 13 are posted to the OD journal. The next fiscal year is automatically created with an opening balance entry (AN journal) carrying the balance sheet balances. No further accounting entries can be added to {{libelle}}.

immobilisations.title: Fixed assets
immobilisations.subtitle: Asset tracking · Depreciation · Disposals
immobilisations.acquisition_help: Uncheck if this asset was already booked elsewhere (historical import).
immobilisations.amort_subtitle: Compute and post the annual depreciation charges for all assets in service.
immobilisations.amort_confirm: Generate depreciation charges for fiscal year {{year}}? All active assets will be depreciated.
immobilisations.amort_explanation: How it works: at each year-end, ApeX computes each in-service asset's depreciation charge based on its method (straight-line or declining-balance) and pro rata temporis. For the first year, only days after the in-service date are counted. A global accounting entry is automatically posted to the OD journal: 681 debit / 28x credit. You can rerun safely: existing charges will not be duplicated.
immobilisations.plan_hint: Entries marked "posted" are already recorded in accounting.
immobilisations.placeholder_motif: Sold to client X, definitive breakdown...
immobilisations.amort_intro: Automatically generates the annual depreciation of each depreciable asset and posts a single OD journal entry.
immobilisations.amort_explanation_full: at each annual closing, ApeX computes each in-service asset's due depreciation according to its method (straight-line or declining) and pro-rata temporis. In the first year only the days after service start are counted. A consolidated OD journal entry is generated automatically: account 681 debit / 28x credit. You may re-run safely: existing entries will not be duplicated.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.restricted_help: The audit log is only available to company owners and administrators.
audit.error_load: Failed to load the audit log

invitation.set_password: Set a password to activate your account.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.subtitle: VAT, IS, BIC, CNPS, ITS — filings and payments
taxes.flex_intro_title: A tax you pay is missing from the list?
taxes.flex_intro_help: Pick « Other »: you freely enter the tax name, rate, beneficiary body and amount. No constraints — you stay in control of your local tax filings (vehicle tag, tourist tax, municipal business tax, exceptional contribution…).
taxes.flex_autre_help: Flexible mode: rate and body are free-form. Enter a descriptive label below so you can find the filing easily.
taxes.flex_libelle_placeholder: e.g. Vehicle tag 2025, Tourist tax Q1, Exceptional contribution…

clients.empty: No customers yet. Start by creating one!

parametres.title: Settings
parametres.subtitle: Customize your ApeX experience
parametres.language_help: Choose the application's display language. The change is applied immediately.
parametres.idu_help: Issued at registration by CEPICI to recently created companies. Displayed on the FNE invoice.
parametres.bank_help: Shown at the bottom of invoices for wire transfer payments.
parametres.remove_member:
Remove this member?

They will IMMEDIATELY lose access to all company data (invoices, accounting, payroll…). Their ApeX account remains active but they won't be able to sign in to this company until an Owner or Admin invites them again.
parametres.read_only_notice: You are viewing this information in read-only mode. Only the owner and administrator can change the company settings.
parametres.fne_intro: Configure your connection to the Ivorian tax authority (DGI) here, for the fiscal certification of your issued invoices (FNE).
parametres.fne_subtitle: Adds an official tax number and a verification QR code to every issued invoice.
parametres.fne_mode_mock_help: No DGI call: generated FNE numbers are prefixed MOCK- and have no fiscal value. Perfect for testing the look of certified invoices.
parametres.fne_mode_sandbox_help: DGI pre-production API: numbers are real but have no fiscal value. Requires an access key issued by the DGI.
parametres.fne_mode_prod_help: ⚠️ Production: certified invoices are fiscally binding and reported to the DGI. API key required.
parametres.fne_actif_label: Enable the DGI connection for this company
parametres.fne_auto_certif_label: Automatically certify every invoice when it leaves draft
parametres.fne_error: Could not save the tax configuration
parametres.fne_queue_intro: When the network or the DGI server is unavailable, invoices to certify are queued and automatically resynced every 15 minutes.
parametres.integrations_intro: Connect ApeX to your Mobile Money accounts to settle your invoices automatically. The customer receives a link (WhatsApp, SMS), pays from their phone, and the invoice is marked paid with no manual entry.
parametres.integrations_quota_title: Mobile Money quota — {{palier}} plan: {{actifs}} / {{max}} operator(s) active in production
parametres.integrations_quota_help: You can activate up to {{max}} operator(s) in production. Demo mode (« mock ») stays unlimited for testing.
parametres.integrations_quota_locked: Your current plan does not grant access to Mobile Money in production. Demo mode (« mock ») remains usable. Upgrade to Starter to activate a real operator.
parametres.guide_intro: Follow these steps to fetch your keys on the operator's developer portal, then fill in the form below.
parametres.guide_wave_step1_titre: Sign in to Wave Business Dashboard
parametres.guide_wave_step1_desc: Sign in to your business space on business.wave.com with the mobile number tied to your merchant account. If you don't have one, request a merchant account from Wave (commercial@wave.com).
parametres.guide_wave_step2_desc: Go to Settings → API / Developers, click « Generate a key », select « Production », name it « ApeX ». Copy the key starting with wave_ci_prod_… (or wave_sn_prod_… in Senegal).
parametres.guide_wave_step3_desc: Still in Settings → API, click « Webhooks » then « Generate a secret ». Copy the string starting with whsec_… — it signs payment notifications so ApeX can verify them.
parametres.guide_wave_step4_titre: Paste both keys into ApeX below
parametres.guide_wave_step4_desc: Switch the mode to « Production », paste the merchant API key into the first field, the webhook secret into the second, and pick the treasury account where the money will be tracked (ideally a 521xxx sub-account « Wave bank »).
parametres.guide_wave_step5_titre: Paste the ApeX webhook URL into Wave Business
parametres.guide_wave_step5_desc: Click the « Copy » button next to the webhook URL further down, go back to Wave Business Dashboard → Webhooks → « Add a webhook » and paste the URL. Pick the « payment received » and « payment failed » events. Finally, click « Save » in ApeX — the status turns Active (green).
parametres.guide_orange_money_step1_titre: Create an Orange Developer Africa account
parametres.guide_orange_money_step1_desc: Sign up on the Orange Developer Africa portal (developer.orange.com) with the manager's email. Create an application — name it for example « Paiement ApeX [SME_name] ». Validation takes 24-48 business hours. You also need an active Orange Money merchant account (CI, SN, ML, etc. — contact your Orange Business advisor).
parametres.guide_orange_money_step2_titre: Enable the « Orange Money Web Payment » API
parametres.guide_orange_money_step2_desc: In the console, open your app → Subscribe to API → choose « Orange Money Web Payment » (covers all Orange countries: CI, SN, ML, BF, etc.). Orange then gives you two keys: Consumer Key and Consumer Secret.
parametres.guide_orange_money_step3_desc: Orange requires the API key to be Base64(ConsumerKey:ConsumerSecret). Easiest path: use the built-in ApeX tool just below (zero network, your keys stay in your browser). Other methods depending on your OS: Windows PowerShell — [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('key:secret')); Linux/macOS — echo -n 'key:secret' | base64; Browser console (F12) — btoa('key:secret'). Paste the result into the « Merchant API key » field in ApeX.
parametres.b64_tool_help: Enter your two keys: ApeX concatenates and encodes them for you. No network calls — everything is computed locally in your browser, your credentials never leave your machine.
parametres.guide_orange_money_step4_titre: Get the Notif Token + fill ApeX
parametres.guide_orange_money_step4_desc: On your Orange Developer space, generate a « Notification Token » (security token that authenticates webhooks). In ApeX: mode « Production », paste the Base64 string in « Merchant API key », the Notif Token in « Webhook secret », and pick the 521xxx « Orange Money » treasury account of your SME (create it first in the Treasury module).
parametres.guide_orange_money_step5_titre: Paste the callback URL into the Orange Money Merchant Dashboard
parametres.guide_orange_money_step5_desc: Copy the ApeX webhook URL (green « Copy » button). Sign in to the Orange Money Merchant Dashboard (NOT the Developer portal — this is the management UI of your merchant account) → notification/callback URL section → paste the address → save. Go back to ApeX and click « Save ». Status switches from Inactive (blue) to Active (green). On every customer payment (#144# or Orange Money app), ApeX receives the notification, marks the invoice as paid and posts the accounting entry (Debit 521 / Credit 411) automatically.
parametres.guide_mtn_momo_step1_titre: Create an MTN MoMo Developer account
parametres.guide_mtn_momo_step1_desc: Sign up on momodeveloper.mtn.com with the manager's email. Subscribe to the « Collection » product (payments collection). The MTN MoMo merchant account must already be open (contact your MTN Côte d'Ivoire advisor) — it's what unlocks real money reception on your merchant number.
parametres.guide_mtn_momo_step2_desc: Once the Collection subscription is approved, go to Profile → Subscriptions. Copy the « Primary Key » of the Collection API — also called Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key in the MTN docs. 64-character hex string. Keep it safe: this is what you paste in the second ApeX field (« Webhook Secret »).
parametres.guide_mtn_momo_step3_titre: Generate the API User (UUID) + API Key
parametres.guide_mtn_momo_step3_desc: MTN uses a two-key scheme: (a) a UUID YOU generate (= API User), (b) an API Key MTN generates from that UUID. Two one-time API calls documented in MTN sandbox. Once you have both, concatenate api_user:api_key and Base64-encode — this string is the Merchant API Key in ApeX. Use the built-in tool below (zero network, your keys stay in the browser).
parametres.guide_mtn_momo_step4_desc: Mode « Production ». Merchant API Key = the Base64(api_user:api_key) string from step 3. Webhook Secret = the Subscription Key (Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key) from step 2. Pick the 521xxx « MTN MoMo » treasury account of your SME (create it beforehand in the Treasury module if not done yet).
parametres.guide_mtn_momo_step5_titre: Paste the Callback URL into the MTN Dashboard
parametres.guide_mtn_momo_step5_desc: Copy the ApeX webhook URL (green « Copy » button). On the MTN MoMo Developer Dashboard → Profile → your app → « Callback URL », paste the address → save. Go back to ApeX, click « Save ». Status switches to Active (green). On every customer payment validated by USSD push (PIN entered on their phone), MTN notifies ApeX which marks the invoice as paid and posts the accounting entry (Debit 521 / Credit 411) without intervention.
parametres.fne_wiz_complete: Setup complete — your invoices are certified at issuance.
parametres.fne_wiz_step1_desc: The Tax Account Number (NCC) is issued by the DGI when your company is registered. It appears on your tax clearance certificate.
parametres.fne_wiz_step2_desc: It is the tax service attached to your registered office (Plateau, Cocody, Yopougon…). It appears on your NCC certificate.
parametres.fne_wiz_step3_desc: Register your company on the official portal: https://fne.dgi.gouv.ci/ (general procedure). The test environment for validating your API integration is at http://54.247.95.108. The DGI validates your application in 1 to 4 weeks depending on your tax office.
parametres.fne_wiz_step4_desc: Once registered, the API key appears in the « Paramétrage » tab of your FNE space (visible only by the main administrator). Enter it in the form below (encrypted at rest, never shown in clear).
parametres.fne_wiz_step5_desc: Before going live, validate the setup with a few fake invoices. Mock mode simulates certification without calling the DGI.
parametres.fne_wiz_step6_desc: Send your invoice specimens to support.fne@dgi.gouv.ci for validation. After approval, the DGI emails you the production URL — then switch mode to « live ». The status pill must read « OK ».
parametres.integration_mode_mock_help: No real API call. Lets you test the ApeX flow (link generation, payment simulation).
parametres.integration_mode_sandbox_help: Calls Wave's test environment. Requires a wave_sn_test_*** key. No real transaction.
parametres.integration_mode_live_help: ⚠️ Production: payments will be real. API key and webhook secret required.
parametres.integration_destination_help: Account where received payments will be recorded. Defaults to the first Mobile Money account in your treasury.
parametres.integration_keep_value: Leave empty to keep the current value
parametres.integration_webhook_help: In your {{dashboard}} dashboard, add this URL as a webhook destination. {{fournisseur}} will send payment confirmations here.
parametres.integration_coming_soon: Coming soon — setup similar to Wave.
parametres.wave_desc: Payment link, automatic settlement and accounting entry generated as soon as the customer pays.
parametres.orange_money_desc: Orange Money Web Payment. The customer pays from the Orange Money app or via USSD #144#.
parametres.mtn_momo_desc: MTN Mobile Money Collections. Direct USSD push to the payer's number (phone must be provided).
parametres.orange_money_secret_placeholder: Token returned by the test payment
parametres.account_exists: {{email}} already has an account: the company will appear on their next login.
parametres.copy_failed: Cannot copy — please select the link manually
parametres.perms_custom_help: By default, this member inherits the ApeX permissions of the chosen role. Toggle on to pick action by action what they can do.
parametres.perms_edit_subtitle: Tick exactly what this member can do. Untick everything on a module to block it entirely.
parametres.perms_owner_protected: The Owner's permissions cannot be restricted — they always keep full access.
parametres.link_help: Share this link (WhatsApp, SMS, email…). It lets them set a password and activate the account. Valid for 7 days.
parametres.role_proprietaire_desc: Company founder. Full access equivalent to administrator.
parametres.role_admin_desc: Business owner. Drives the activity, manages members and all operational modules.
parametres.role_expert_comptable_desc: External ONECCA-certified firm. Exclusive owner of year-end closing and DSF tax filing.
parametres.role_comptable_desc: Internal accountant. Bookkeeping and treasury, no payroll or audit log access.
parametres.role_rh_desc: Handles payroll (employees, payslips, CNPS/ITS) without accounting or treasury access.
parametres.role_commercial_desc: Issues quotes, proformas and invoices. Reads the product catalog without seeing purchase prices.
parametres.role_magasinier_desc: Manages stock movements and inventories, without access to supplier purchase prices.
parametres.role_auditeur_desc: Statutory auditor. Read-only on all modules to certify the accounts.
parametres.role_user_desc: Read access and limited entry depending on modules (legacy role).

tresorerie.form_no_overdraft_info: Strict block: no outflow can make the balance negative.

tresorerie.statements_empty: No statement imported for this account.

rh.title: Payroll & HR
rh.subtitle: Personnel management, SYSCOHADA payslips and social declarations
rh.cnps_info: Contribution rates are automatically applied according to the CNPS scale and the Ivorian CGI: CNPS retirement 6.3% employee + 7.7% employer, family benefits 5.75%, AT variable (default 2%), FDFP 1.2%, apprenticeship tax 0.4%. ITS and CN are computed on a progressive scale.
rh.no_bulletin_period: No payslip for {{month}} {{year}}. Click "Generate monthly payroll".
rh.generer_desc_1: ApeX will generate a draft payslip for every active employee for the period {{month}} {{year}}.
rh.generer_desc_2: Already validated or paid payslips will be ignored. Existing drafts will be updated.
rh.generer_desc_3: You can then add bonuses, overtime and advances before validating and paying each payslip individually.
rh.generer_errors: {{count}} error(s) — see the audit log for details
rh.rubriques_info: The items catalog contains every possible payroll element: bonuses, allowances, deductions, contributions. System items are preset according to CI regulations and cannot be deleted (but their rates/values can be edited).

tarifs.page_subtitle: Pick the plan that matches your company size and activity. No commitment, switch any time.
tarifs.palier_starter_tagline: Ideal for sole traders and micro-businesses
tarifs.saved_msg: Your new plan is now active. Welcome!
tarifs.faq_q1: Can I switch plans at any time?
tarifs.faq_a1: Yes. You can upgrade (or downgrade) at any time from Settings → Subscription. The new limits apply immediately.
tarifs.faq_q2: What happens at the end of the Discovery trial?
tarifs.faq_a2: Your data is kept. After 30 days you must pick a paid plan to keep creating more than 10 invoices per month. No automatic charges: you switch to read-only until you choose.
tarifs.faq_q3: How is billing handled in Côte d'Ivoire?
tarifs.faq_a3: Bank transfer (UEMOA), Wave, Orange Money or MTN Mobile Money. DGI-compliant invoice issued at each renewal.
tarifs.faq_a4: Yes, 100 %. You can export your accounting (OHADA general ledger, trial balance, journals), customers and invoices in PDF/CSV at any time, no formality.
tarifs.faq_q5: How many users can work at the same time?
tarifs.faq_a5: It depends on the plan. Discovery opens access to 1 user, Starter to 3, Pro to 10 and Cabinet is unlimited. They can all work in parallel without stepping on each other, each with their own role and permissions.
tarifs.faq_q6: Are my data hosted in Africa?
tarifs.faq_a6: Yes. Your entries, invoices and payslips are hosted on servers located in West Africa, in line with OHADA recommendations on accounting data localisation. Encrypted backups every day.
tarifs.faq_q7: Is ApeX compliant with DGI and OHADA obligations?
tarifs.faq_a7: Yes. Revised SYSCOHADA chart of accounts pre-installed (804 accounts), CNPS and ITS payslips at the official Côte d'Ivoire rates, FNE-certified invoices transmitted to the DGI, and entries kept immutable per article 17 of the OHADA Uniform Act. During an audit, you export the general ledger in two clicks.
tarifs.faq_q8: What happens to my books if I cancel my subscription?
tarifs.faq_a8: Your data stays available in read-only mode for 90 days after cancellation, giving you time to export whatever you need (general ledger, journals, trial balance, payslips, invoices as PDF). No abrupt cut-off, no data destroyed without notice.
tarifs.faq_q9: How does support work when something breaks?
tarifs.faq_a9: Email support within 24 business hours on Starter and Pro, priority WhatsApp support on Pro and Cabinet (average reply 2 h during Ivorian working hours). The team is based in Abidjan and speaks French — no overnight English-only hotline.
tarifs.faq_q10: How long does it take to get up and running?
tarifs.faq_a10: Five minutes to create the account and issue your first invoice (the SYSCOHADA chart and the 10 categories are already installed). For an SME starting from scratch, plan a morning to key in your main customers, suppliers and products. Bulk import from Excel or Sage is not available yet — it's on our 2026 roadmap.

celebration.title_new: Glad to have you on board — your {{palier}} plan is active!
celebration.title_upgrade: Congratulations, you are now on the {{palier}} plan!
celebration.subtitle: Everything is set up so you can run your business with peace of mind. Here's a glimpse of what you've just unlocked.
celebration.thanks: Thank you for placing your trust in us. Our team is here to support you — never hesitate to reach out.
celebration.h_factures10: Up to 10 invoices per month to try things out for real
celebration.h_fne: DGI (FNE) tax certification on every issued invoice
celebration.h_ocr30: 30 OCR scans per month — no more re-typing your paper receipts
celebration.h_mm1: Mobile Money collection via 1 provider (Wave, Orange or MTN)
celebration.h_ocr300: 300 OCR scans per month for high volumes of receipts
celebration.h_mm3: Wave, Orange Money AND MTN MoMo activated simultaneously
celebration.h_paie25: Payroll & HR module with 25 payslips/month (CNPS, ITS, CMU automated)
celebration.h_immo: Fixed assets module with automatic depreciation
celebration.h_support: Email and WhatsApp support within 12 hours
celebration.h_users_unlim: Unlimited users — invite your whole team
celebration.h_ent15: Manage up to 15 companies under a single account
celebration.h_api: Access to the public API for your custom integrations
celebration.h_paie_unlim: Unlimited payslips, ideal for a client portfolio
celebration.h_support_prio: Priority WhatsApp and phone support within 4 hours
